title: Tutorials for Learning VS Code in GitHub Codespaces
text: many tutorials package. recommended way launch R Tutorials extension VS Code, lists every installed tutorial lets start one click. backup, can launch tutorial R console learnr::run_tutorial(), providing short name tutorial package name.

title: Tutorials for Learning VS Code in GitHub Codespaces
text: core tutorials introduce students VS Code integrated development environment. VS Code Scripts (“01-code”). Introduce students VS Code writing R code simple scripts. VS Code Quarto (“02-quarto”). Demonstrate tricks working R code using VS Code, also explain Quarto documents. Terminal (“03-terminal”). Teach command line. VS Code GitHub Introduction (“04-github-1”). Explain basics Git GitHub, mostly context VS Code. VS Code GitHub Advanced (“05-github-2”). Provide practice working Git/GitHub, including details use GitHub Pages. Quarto Websites Introduction (“06-websites-1”). Demonstrate basics website construction using Quarto projects. Quarto Websites Advanced (“07-websites-2”). Practice Quarto websites, focus splitting data analysis tasks separate files.

title: Tutorials for Learning VS Code in GitHub Codespaces
text: tutorials cover material R Data Science (2e) (R4DS) Hadley Wickham, Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel, Garrett Grolemund. five related tutorials package: r4ds-1, r4ds-2, r4ds-3, r4ds-4, r4ds-5. Different tutorials cover different chapters book follows.

title: VS Code Tutorials — vscode.tutorials-package
text: vscode.tutorials package provides interactive tutorials three main categories: VS Code modern development tools, R Data Science fundamentals, US Census data analysis. R Data Science tutorials based R Data Science (2e) Hadley Wickham, Mine Çetinkaya-Rundel, Garrett Grolemund. Census tutorial draws Analyzing US Census Data: Methods, Maps, Models R Kyle Walker.

title: VS Code Tutorials — vscode.tutorials-package
text: comprehensive collection interactive tutorials covering VS Code modern development workflows, R Data Science essentials, US Census data analysis. package makes extensive use tools tutorial.helpers package.

what: VS Code and Development Tools Tutorials
title: VS Code Tutorials — vscode.tutorials-package
text: package includes seven tutorials focused VS Code modern R development: VS Code Scripts (01-code): Introduction VS Code writing R code simple scripts VS Code Quarto (02-quarto): Advanced R coding tricks VS Code Quarto document creation Terminal (03-terminal): Command line fundamentals VS Code GitHub Introduction (04-github-1): Git GitHub basics within VS Code VS Code GitHub Advanced (05-github-2): Advanced Git/GitHub workflows GitHub Pages Quarto Websites Introduction (06-websites-1): Basic website construction using Quarto projects Quarto Websites Advanced (07-websites-2): Advanced Quarto websites modular data analysis

title: VS Code Tutorials — vscode.tutorials-package
text: package includes five r4ds tutorials (r4ds-1 r4ds-5) cover: Data import visualization Data transformations tidying Working databases, strings, regular expressions Factors, dates, times, joins Web scraping, functions, iterations

title: VS Code Tutorials — vscode.tutorials-package
text: tidycensus-1 tutorial covers working US Census data using tidycensus package.

title: VS Code Tutorials — vscode.tutorials-package
text: run tutorial, use: learnr::run_tutorial(name = "short_tutorial_name", package = "vscode.tutorials") Available tutorial names include: 01-code, 02-quarto, 03-terminal, 04-github-1, 05-github-2, 06-websites-1, 07-websites-2, r4ds-1, r4ds-2, r4ds-3, r4ds-4, r4ds-5, tidycensus-1.
